content_of_post_to_comment: I spent my morning with two girlfriends. The whole time we were discussing the ways their partners were letting them down and the compromises they were having to make. I eventually asked them if it was worth it. Being in a relationship. One answered me “no.” She said if she was single again she wouldn’t remarry. She would live alone, have lots of friends and focus on her career. And that made me wonder.
